info.title: StyleSeat Search API
info.description:
API for searching services, stylists, and salons on StyleSeat.
The API allows searching by location (CITY-STATE) and endpoint (service name, stylist, or salon).

get.summary: Search for services, stylists, or salons
get.description:
Retrieves a list of results based on a specific location and endpoint.
The endpoint can represent a specific service type, a stylist, or a salon.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description:
The search term. This can be a predefined service type, or the name of a stylist/salon.
Predefined services include: `acrylic-nails`, `braids`, `eyebrot-threading`, `eyelash-extensions`, `haircut`, `kids`, `locs`, `makeup-artist`, `mens-haircut`, `natural-hair`, `pedicure`, `silk-press`, `waxing`, `weaves`, or `wig`.

200.description: A list of search results matching the criteria.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid location format or endpoint.

404.description: Not Found - No results found for the given location and endpoint.

id.description: Unique identifier for the professional or service.

name.description: Name of the stylist, salon, or service.

services.description: List of services offered by this provider.

image_url.description: URL to a profile or business image.
